title: Paul Danner
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Paul M. Danner''' is an author who wrote six short stories for the ''[[Star Wars Adventure Journal]]'': "[[One of a Kind (short story)|One of a Kind]]," "[[Easy Credits]]," "[[Small Favors]]," "[[The Last Hand (short story)|The Last Hand]]," "[[No Disintegrations, Please]]," and "[[Two for One]]." "No Disintegrations, Please" and "The Last Hand" were reprinted in ''[[Tales from the New Republic]]'' in 1999. His short stories could also be found on [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].

He was also the author of ''[[Wretched Hives of Scum & Villainy]]'', a sourcebook for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.

Paul Danner is the co-author and screenwriter of ''Who Will I Be with in Heaven'' book. He is the co-screenwriter of ''If You Only Knew'' drama film (2010).<ref>{{BookCite|author=Hernando, Jorgea; Danner, Paul|title=Who Will I Be with in Heaven|publisher=BookBaby|date=2019|isbn=1543981062|issn=|quote=Paul Danner is the co-author and screenwriter of Who Will I Be with in Heaven. He is the co-screenwriter of If You Only Knew (2010.) He is also a Star Wars author, having written six Star Wars short stories, two of which were featured in the Star Wars: Tales from the New Republic anthology (Bantam Spectra) and the guidebook, Wretched Hives of Scum and Villainy|link=https://books.google.ru/books/about/Who_Will_I_Be_with_in_Heaven.html?id=JtoaygEACAAJ}}</ref>
